a:stairway8|tagline.text: The lift is out. Eight floors down, one landing at a time.
a:stairway8|tagline.postedit: The lift is out. Eight floors down, one landing at a time.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|0.text: A caged bulb throws steady light across the landing.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|0.postedit: A caged bulb throws steady light across the landing.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|1.text: The stairwell light burns evenly overhead, as always.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|1.postedit: The stairwell light burns evenly overhead, as always.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|2.text: The fluorescent strip on the landing glows its usual flat white.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|2.postedit: The fluorescent strip on the landing glows its usual flat white.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|3.text: Light falls here the same as every landing above.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|v:steady|3.postedit: Light falls here the same as every landing above.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.text: The caged bulb stutters, then steadies.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|0.postedit: The caged bulb stutters, then steadies.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.text: The stairwell light flickers in a way it hasn't before.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|1.postedit: The stairwell light flickers in a way it hasn't before.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.text: Overhead, the light trips once and comes back.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:flicker|2.postedit: Overhead, the light trips once and comes back.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|0.text: This landing is dimmer than the ones above it.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|0.postedit: This landing is dimmer than the ones above it.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|1.text: The light here has half given up; the corners stay dark.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|1.postedit: The light here has half given up; the corners stay dark.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|2.text: A grey murk hangs over the landing.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:dim|2.postedit: A grey murk hangs over the landing.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|0.text: The landing is lit red, an emergency bulb you don't remember.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|0.postedit: The landing is lit red, an emergency bulb you don't remember.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|1.text: Everything wears a low red emergency glow.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|1.postedit: Everything wears a low red emergency glow.

a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|2.text: The white light is gone; only a red bulb remains.
a:stairway8|p:lighting|x:red|2.postedit: The white light is gone; only a red bulb remains.

a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|0.text: Your footsteps echo up the shaft and fade.
a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|0.postedit: Your footsteps echo up the shaft and fade.

a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|1.text: The stairwell is quiet but for your own steps.
a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|1.postedit: The stairwell is quiet but for your own steps.

a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|2.text: Far below, the building hums to itself.
a:stairway8|p:sound|v:quiet|2.postedit: Far below, the building hums to itself.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:drip|0.text: Water drips somewhere down the shaft. Tick. Tick.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:drip|0.postedit: Water drips somewhere down the shaft. Tick. Tick.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:drip|1.text: A slow drip echoes up from below.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:drip|1.postedit: A slow drip echoes up from below.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|0.text: A door slams far below, then silence.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|0.postedit: A door slams far below, then silence.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|1.text: Somewhere beneath you a door bangs shut.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|1.postedit: Somewhere beneath you a door bangs shut.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|2.text: A heavy door closes several floors down.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:slam|2.postedit: A heavy door closes several floors down.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|0.text: Footsteps climb towards you, then stop.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|0.postedit: Footsteps climb towards you, then stop.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|1.text: You hear steps that aren't yours on the flight below.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|1.postedit: You hear steps that aren't yours on the flight below.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|2.text: For a moment, someone else is on the stairs.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:footsteps|2.postedit: For a moment, someone else is on the stairs.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|0.text: The building's hum has stopped. Dead quiet.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|0.postedit: The building's hum has stopped. Dead quiet.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|1.text: It is completely silent. Too silent.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|1.postedit: It is completely silent. Too silent.

a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|2.text: Even the echo of your steps seems to vanish.
a:stairway8|p:sound|x:silence|2.postedit: Even the echo of your steps seems to vanish.

a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|0.text: A large painted 8 marks the landing wall.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|0.postedit: A large painted 8 marks the landing wall.

a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|1.text: The floor number, 8, is stencilled on the concrete.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|1.postedit: The floor number, 8, is stencilled on the concrete.

a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|2.text: '8' is painted on the wall, drips frozen beneath the strokes.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|2.postedit: '8' is painted on the wall, drips frozen beneath the strokes.

a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|3.text: The wall reads 8, the same as the landing before.
a:stairway8|p:number|v:eight|3.postedit: The wall reads 8, the same as the landing before.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|0.text: The wall reads 7. It has always read 8.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|0.postedit: The wall reads 7. It has always read 8.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|1.text: The painted number is a 6 now, not an 8.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|1.postedit: The painted number is a 6 now, not an 8.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|2.text: The floor number has changed: it says 9.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:wrong|2.postedit: The floor number has changed: it says 9.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|0.text: The wall reads B. Basement. You are nowhere near it.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|0.postedit: The wall reads B. Basement. You are nowhere near it.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|1.text: The number is gone; a painted 'B' stands in its place.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|1.postedit: The number is gone; a painted 'B' stands in its place.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|2.text: The stencil reads B, though you've barely started down.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:basement|2.postedit: The stencil reads B, though you've barely started down.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|0.text: The painted number has faded to a grey ghost.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|0.postedit: The painted number has faded to a grey ghost.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|1.text: Someone has scrubbed the number half away.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|1.postedit: Someone has scrubbed the number half away.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|2.text: The 8 on the wall is almost gone.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:faded|2.postedit: The 8 on the wall is almost gone.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:reversed|0.text: The 8 is painted backwards, as if seen in a mirror.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:reversed|0.postedit: The 8 is painted backwards, as if seen in a mirror.

a:stairway8|p:number|x:reversed|2.text: The stencilled number reads the wrong way round.
a:stairway8|p:number|x:reversed|2.postedit: The stencilled number reads the wrong way round.

a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|0.text: The fire door to the floor is shut, its wired glass dark.
a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|0.postedit: The fire door to the floor is shut, its wired glass dark.

a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|1.text: The heavy grey fire door stands closed on the landing.
a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|1.postedit: The heavy grey fire door stands closed on the landing.

a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|2.text: The door onto the floor is closed, the way it should be.
a:stairway8|p:door|v:closed|2.postedit: The door onto the floor is closed, the way it should be.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|0.text: The fire door hangs slightly ajar. A black gap, no light.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|0.postedit: The fire door hangs slightly ajar. A black gap, no light.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|1.text: The heavy door is open a crack; it never is.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|1.postedit: The heavy door is open a crack; it never is.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|2.text: The fire door isn't quite shut this time.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:ajar|2.postedit: The fire door isn't quite shut this time.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|0.text: The fire door is propped wide open onto a dark floor.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|0.postedit: The fire door is propped wide open onto a dark floor.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|1.text: Someone has wedged the fire door open.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|1.postedit: Someone has wedged the fire door open.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|2.text: The door stands fully open, held by nothing you can see.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:propped|2.postedit: The door stands fully open, held by nothing you can see.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|0.text: The wired-glass window in the door has gone black, covered.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|0.postedit: The wired-glass window in the door has gone black, covered.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|1.text: The little window in the fire door is blocked from the other side.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|1.postedit: The little window in the fire door is blocked from the other side.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|2.text: Something presses against the glass in the door.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:window|2.postedit: Something presses against the glass in the door.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|0.text: The fire door has no handle now.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|0.postedit: The fire door has no handle now.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|1.text: Where the door handle was, only bare holes.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|1.postedit: Where the door handle was, only bare holes.

a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|2.text: The handle is missing from the fire door.
a:stairway8|p:door|x:handle|2.postedit: The handle is missing from the fire door.

a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|0.text: A taped notice on the lift reads OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS.
a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|0.postedit: A taped notice on the lift reads OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS.

a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|1.text: The repair notice is still there: lift out of order.
a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|1.postedit: The repair notice is still there: lift out of order.

a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|2.text: OUT OF ORDER, says the sign taped across the lift doors.
a:stairway8|p:notice|v:out|2.postedit: OUT OF ORDER, says the sign taped across the lift doors.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|0.text: The lift notice is gone. Just bare metal doors.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|0.postedit: The lift notice is gone. Just bare metal doors.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|1.text: No sign on the lift this time.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|1.postedit: No sign on the lift this time.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|2.text: The repair notice has been taken down.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:gone|2.postedit: The repair notice has been taken down.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|0.text: The notice now reads LIFT IN SERVICE.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|0.postedit: The notice now reads LIFT IN SERVICE.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|1.text: The sign says the lift is working again.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|1.postedit: The sign says the lift is working again.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|2.text: OUT OF ORDER has become BACK IN SERVICE.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:service|2.postedit: OUT OF ORDER has become BACK IN SERVICE.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|0.text: The notice reads DO NOT USE STAIRS.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|0.postedit: The notice reads DO NOT USE STAIRS.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|1.text: The sign warns STAIRS CLOSED, it never did before.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|1.postedit: The sign warns STAIRS CLOSED, it never did before.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|2.text: The notice now tells you not to take the stairs at all.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:wording|2.postedit: The notice now tells you not to take the stairs at all.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|0.text: The arrow on the notice points up, not down.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|0.postedit: The arrow on the notice points up, not down.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|1.text: The sign's arrow has flipped to point back up the stairs.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|1.postedit: The sign's arrow has flipped to point back up the stairs.

a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|2.text: The notice directs you upward now.
a:stairway8|p:notice|x:arrow|2.postedit: The notice directs you upward now.

a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|0.text: The steel handrail runs cold and unbroken under your hand.
a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|0.postedit: The steel handrail runs cold and unbroken under your hand.

a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|1.text: The painted railing is right where it always is.
a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|1.postedit: The painted railing is right where it always is.

a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|2.text: Your hand finds the handrail, continuous along the flight.
a:stairway8|p:railing|v:cold|2.postedit: Your hand finds the handrail, continuous along the flight.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|0.text: A section of the handrail is missing over the drop.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|0.postedit: A section of the handrail is missing over the drop.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|1.text: The railing has a gap where a length has been removed.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|1.postedit: The railing has a gap where a length has been removed.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|2.text: Part of the handrail simply isn't there.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:gap|2.postedit: Part of the handrail simply isn't there.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|0.text: The handrail is wet, though nothing drips on it.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|0.postedit: The handrail is wet, though nothing drips on it.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|1.text: Your hand comes away damp from the rail.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|1.postedit: Your hand comes away damp from the rail.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|2.text: The railing is slick under your palm.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:wet|2.postedit: The railing is slick under your palm.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|0.text: The railing is a different colour from the flights above.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|0.postedit: The railing is a different colour from the flights above.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|1.text: Someone has repainted this stretch of handrail.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|1.postedit: Someone has repainted this stretch of handrail.

a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|2.text: The rail's paint is green here, not grey.
a:stairway8|p:railing|x:paint|2.postedit: The rail's paint is green here, not grey.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|0.text: A fire extinguisher hangs on its bracket beside the door.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|0.postedit: A fire extinguisher hangs on its bracket beside the door.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|1.text: The red extinguisher is in its place on the wall.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|1.postedit: The red extinguisher is in its place on the wall.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|2.text: The landing's fire extinguisher sits on its hook.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|v:present|2.postedit: The landing's fire extinguisher sits on its hook.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gone|1.text: The fire extinguisher is gone; only the bracket remains.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gone|1.postedit: The fire extinguisher is gone; only the bracket remains.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gone|2.text: No extinguisher on the wall this time.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gone|2.postedit: No extinguisher on the wall this time.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|0.text: The extinguisher lies on the floor, on its side.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|0.postedit: The extinguisher lies on the floor, on its side.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|1.text: The fire extinguisher has been set down on the landing.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|1.postedit: The fire extinguisher has been set down on the landing.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|2.text: The extinguisher stands loose against the wall, off its hook.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:floor|2.postedit: The extinguisher stands loose against the wall, off its hook.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|0.text: The extinguisher's pressure gauge reads in the red.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|0.postedit: The extinguisher's pressure gauge reads in the red.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|1.text: The needle on the extinguisher sits deep in the red.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|1.postedit: The needle on the extinguisher sits deep in the red.

a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|2.text: The extinguisher's gauge has dropped to empty.
a:stairway8|p:extinguisher|x:gauge|2.postedit: The extinguisher's gauge has dropped to empty.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|0.text: The flight down is clear, its steps even and dry.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|0.postedit: The flight down is clear, its steps even and dry.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|1.text: The stairs descend as always, nothing on them.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|1.postedit: The stairs descend as always, nothing on them.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|2.text: The next flight drops away, clean and empty.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|v:clear|2.postedit: The next flight drops away, clean and empty.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|0.text: The steps below shine wet in the light.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|0.postedit: The steps below shine wet in the light.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|1.text: The next flight is slick with water.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|1.postedit: The next flight is slick with water.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|2.text: The stairs down are wet, though you saw no spill.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:wet|2.postedit: The stairs down are wet, though you saw no spill.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|0.text: One of the steps in the flight below is missing.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|0.postedit: One of the steps in the flight below is missing.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|1.text: There's a gap in the stairs where a step should be.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|1.postedit: There's a gap in the stairs where a step should be.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|2.text: A tread is gone from the flight down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:missing|2.postedit: A tread is gone from the flight down.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|0.text: The arrow stencilled on the steps points UP, not down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|0.postedit: The arrow stencilled on the steps points UP, not down.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|1.text: The direction painted on the stairs has reversed.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|1.postedit: The direction painted on the stairs has reversed.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|2.text: The steps seem to lead up now, though you are going down.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:up|2.postedit: The steps seem to lead up now, though you are going down.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|0.text: Something has been left on the steps below, a bag, maybe.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|0.postedit: Something has been left on the steps below, a bag, maybe.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|1.text: There's debris scattered across the next flight.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|1.postedit: There's debris scattered across the next flight.

a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|2.text: A dark shape sits partway down the flight.
a:stairway8|p:stairs|x:debris|2.postedit: A dark shape sits partway down the flight.

a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|0.text: Far below, someone else winds down the stairwell, always a flight or two ahead.
a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|0.postedit: Far below, someone else winds down the stairwell, always a flight or two ahead.

a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|1.text: A figure descends the shaft ahead of you, keeping the same distance.
a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|1.postedit: A figure descends the shaft ahead of you, keeping the same distance.

a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|2.text: Someone is on the stairs below, going down at your pace, never closer.
a:stairway8|p:figure|v:below|2.postedit: Someone is on the stairs below, going down at your pace, never closer.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|0.text: The figure below has stopped. It is looking up at you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|0.postedit: The figure below has stopped. It is looking up at you.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|1.text: Down the shaft, the figure stands still, face turned up towards you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|1.postedit: Down the shaft, the figure stands still, face turned up towards you.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|2.text: The one on the stairs isn't descending now. It's watching you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:facing|2.postedit: The one on the stairs isn't descending now. It's watching you.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|0.text: The figure on the stairs is much closer than before, just a flight down.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|0.postedit: The figure on the stairs is much closer than before, just a flight down.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|1.text: The descending figure has closed the distance; it's nearly on your landing.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|1.postedit: The descending figure has closed the distance; it's nearly on your landing.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|2.text: Whoever is below is only a few steps down now.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:closer|2.postedit: Whoever is below is only a few steps down now.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|0.text: The stairwell below is empty. Whoever was descending is gone.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|0.postedit: The stairwell below is empty. Whoever was descending is gone.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|1.text: There is no figure on the stairs this time.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|1.postedit: There is no figure on the stairs this time.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|2.text: The one ahead of you has vanished from the shaft.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:gone|2.postedit: The one ahead of you has vanished from the shaft.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|0.text: The figure is climbing now, coming up the stairs towards you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|0.postedit: The figure is climbing now, coming up the stairs towards you.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|1.text: Footsteps rise: the figure below is ascending, not descending.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|1.postedit: Footsteps rise: the figure below is ascending, not descending.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|2.text: The one on the stairs has turned around and is coming up.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:ascending|2.postedit: The one on the stairs has turned around and is coming up.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|0.text: The figure below looks up and lifts a hand, as if it has been waiting for you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|0.postedit: The figure below looks up and lifts a hand, as if it has been waiting for you.

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|1.text: The figure mouths something up the shaft. It might be 'again.'
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|1.postedit: The figure mouths something up the shaft. It might be 'again.'

a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|2.text: It beckons you down, slow and certain, as though it knows you.
a:stairway8|p:figure|x:knows|2.postedit: It beckons you down, slow and certain, as though it knows you.

a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|0.text: The shaft feels exactly as deep as it always has.
a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|0.postedit: The shaft feels exactly as deep as it always has.

a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|1.text: You carry the same wariness down flight after flight.
a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|1.postedit: You carry the same wariness down flight after flight.

a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|2.text: Everything feels ordinary, as far as any of this is ordinary.
a:stairway8|p:sense|v:steady|2.postedit: Everything feels ordinary, as far as any of this is ordinary.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|0.text: The shaft feels deeper than it should, the ground floor further off.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|0.postedit: The shaft feels deeper than it should, the ground floor further off.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|1.text: You feel you've descended far more than eight floors.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|1.postedit: You feel you've descended far more than eight floors.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|2.text: The bottom seems to have moved further away.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:deeper|2.postedit: The bottom seems to have moved further away.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|0.text: For a moment you can't remember how many landings you've passed.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|0.postedit: For a moment you can't remember how many landings you've passed.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|1.text: You lose count of the flights above you, and it frightens you.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|1.postedit: You lose count of the flights above you, and it frightens you.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|2.text: You can't recall which floor you started on.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:forget|2.postedit: You can't recall which floor you started on.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|0.text: For an instant you're certain you've been climbing, not descending.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|0.postedit: For an instant you're certain you've been climbing, not descending.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|1.text: A wrong feeling grips you: that down has been up all along.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|1.postedit: A wrong feeling grips you: that down has been up all along.

a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|2.text: You feel, briefly and coldly, that you are going the wrong way.
a:stairway8|p:sense|x:up|2.postedit: You feel, briefly and coldly, that you are going the wrong way.

a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0.text: You check the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.
a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|0.postedit: You check the {THING} again. You aren't sure why.

a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1.text: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.
a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|1.postedit: Your eyes go straight to the {THING}, the way they always seem to now.

a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2.text: The {THING} draws your attention once more.
a:stairway8|adaptive|repeat_inspect|2.postedit: The {THING} draws your attention once more.

a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|0.text: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.
a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|0.postedit: You spend longer looking than usual. You don't remember deciding to stop.

a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|1.text: You realise you've been standing on the landing. For how long?
a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|1.postedit: You realise you've been standing on the landing. For how long?

a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|2.text: Time slips. You were staring down the shaft, and you don't know for how long.
a:stairway8|adaptive|long_look|2.postedit: Time slips. You were staring down the shaft, and you don't know for how long.

a:stairway8|framing|intro|2.text: You press the call button. Nothing. A notice is taped across the doors:
a:stairway8|framing|intro|2.postedit: You press the call button. Nothing. A notice is taped across the doors:

a:stairway8|framing|intro|3.text: LIFT OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|3.postedit: LIFT OUT OF ORDER, USE STAIRS.

a:stairway8|framing|intro|5.text: While a landing is exactly as you remember it, keep descending.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|5.postedit: While a landing is exactly as you remember it, keep descending.

a:stairway8|framing|intro|6.text: If anything has changed, the stairwell has turned you around. Climb back up.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|6.postedit: If anything has changed, the stairwell has turned you around. Climb back up.

a:stairway8|framing|intro|8.text: The ground floor is the way out.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|8.postedit: The ground floor is the way out.

a:stairway8|framing|intro|9.text: Lose count of the landings, and you'll be back at the top.
a:stairway8|framing|intro|9.postedit: Lose count of the landings, and you'll be back at the top.

a:stairway8|framing|win|0.text: The last flight opens onto the lobby.
a:stairway8|framing|win|0.postedit: The last flight opens onto the lobby.

a:stairway8|framing|win|1.text: Daylight through the doors. The street. The lift behind you, still dead.
a:stairway8|framing|win|1.postedit: Daylight through the doors. The street. The lift behind you, still dead.

a:stairway8|framing|win|2.text: Eight floors down, and your memory held every landing.
a:stairway8|framing|win|2.postedit: Eight floors down, and your memory held every landing.
